pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 31 contains 'loop-the-loop' in Q3; HOWEVER export_result.sh lines 70-76 specifies different required_strings list with 'Name:' instead of 'loop-the-loop'. The verifier implementation does not check for 'loop-the-loop'.

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a synthetic physics test document in Apache OpenOffice Writer. All task data is generated programmatically: the exam draft is created in setup_task.sh with 4 questions, 3 of which contain formula codes (kinetic energy, work-energy theorem, gravitational potential energy), and a synthetic PNG image is generated. The task.json metadata contains contradictions: it claims required_strings should include 'kinetic energy' (lowercase) but the draft contains 'Kinetic Energy' (mixed case); it claims 'loop-the-loop' must be verified but the actual verifier script checks for 'Name:' instead. Three metadata values are verified (expected_formulas=3, file paths), but five metadata claims about required strings are contradicted by the actual verifier implementation in export_result.sh.
